title: Pungent Quick-Fix Oaxacan Bay Leaves Fried Dough Balls
description: Crunchy fried dough balls infused with the earthy flavor of bay leaves, a snappy twist on traditional Mexican churros.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, crushed bay leaves, nutmeg, and baking powder.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and 1/4 cup of vegetable oil.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Heat about 2-3 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a piping bag or a plastic bag with a corner cut off, pipe the dough into 4-6 inch pieces.
Fry the dough balls for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and puffed up.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried dough balls from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve warm and dust with cinnamon.
Optional: Drizzle with honey or syrup for added sweetness.
